diff:
diff --git a/src/parsers.py b/src/parsers.py
index 5094f17..e24fca5 100644
--- a/src/parsers.py
+++ b/src/parsers.py
@@ -1,12 +1,16 @@
 def parse_bool(value: str) -> bool:
-    if value == "true":
+    v = value.strip().lower()
+    if v == "true":
         return True
-    if value == "false":
+    if v == "false":
         return False
     raise ValueError(f"invalid boolean: {value}")
 
 
 def parse_optional_int(value: str | None) -> int | None:
-    if value is None or value == "":
+    if value is None:
         return None
-    return int(value)
+    v = value.strip()
+    if v == "":
+        return None
+    return int(v)
diff --git a/src/settings.py b/src/settings.py
index d76295c..6d7611e 100644
--- a/src/settings.py
+++ b/src/settings.py
@@ -1,4 +1,4 @@
-from src.parsers import parse_optional_int
+from src.parsers import parse_optional_int, parse_bool
 
 DEFAULTS = {"debug": False, "port": 8000, "timeout": 30}
 
@@ -10,7 +10,11 @@ def load_settings(env: dict[str, str]) -> dict[str, object]:
         if parsed_port is not None:
             settings["port"] = parsed_port
     if "APP_TIMEOUT" in env:
-        settings["timeout"] = env["APP_TIMEOUT"]
+        raw = env["APP_TIMEOUT"].strip()
+        if raw != "":
+            settings["timeout"] = int(raw)
     if "APP_DEBUG" in env:
-        settings["debug"] = env["APP_DEBUG"] == "true"
+        raw = env["APP_DEBUG"].strip()
+        if raw != "":
+            settings["debug"] = parse_bool(raw)
     return settings
